steps.title: Complete the opening phrase
steps.content: Between 2006 and needs a year to complete the time range. After that introductory phrase, the main clause needs a determiner before lions, so the sentence should continue with these lions prowled.

steps.title: Reject broken sentence forms
steps.content:
• Choice A fails to complete the year range and creates an awkward when clause.
  • Choice B puts a period after the year, leaving Between 2006 and 2012 as a fragment.
  • Choice C uses because, turning the main idea into an incomplete causal clause.
The answer is D.
